textPlain: I think the significance of the Epistola Posterior only really emerged decades after it was written, when the bitter Newton–Leibniz priority controversy erupted.  It served as Newton’s key evidence, by revealing that he had the main ideas well before Leibniz’s first publications (1684).  The letter bolstered the Royal Society’s eventual judgment favoring Newton’s independent discovery.
lots of "math processing error". perhaps just render the formulas?
